method.probe: one unpaid POST per agent; read whatever the endpoint answers
method.cost: none — no payment was signed or sent for any probe
method.attempts: up to 2, retried only on network-level failure
method.population: the FIRST endpoint-bearing service per agent, not every service
method.what_it_proves: endpoint liveness, x402 conformance, and the price actually demanded
method.what_it_does_not_prove: that a paid response is correct or useful; that an agent's OTHER services share this verdict
